data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. BRAVE IN SEATTLE battled on well to hold second last start over 800m at Ipswich, beaten a neck as favourite. Finds the right race this time and can find winning ways. 6. LUKEY BLUE is back from a spell of 12 weeks. Closed last campaign with a minor placing over 1100m at Ipswich. Sure to make her presence felt. 2. SWITCH THE STARS has not raced since his debut on October 1 over 1000m at Eagle Farm when he finished fifth, beaten 7 lengths. This is easier and can run a race while fresh. 11. KOTOR BAY resuming from a lay-off. Recent trial winner at Doomben. Raced just once when last in work and finished sixth at Gold Coast over 1000m. In the mix.","runners":[5,6,2,11],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: KILCOY-R1-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
